problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: If Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
